---
title: "02. 齐物与差异折平"
subtitle: "Equalizing Things and Folding Distinctions"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 2
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "Qiwu is not a flat denial of all difference; it is a disciplined return from rigid binary fixation to a more stable field of compatibility. That is closest to Fold: not annihilation, but lawful normal..."
---

**Chapters:** 2, 17, 26, 27  
**Omega Directions:** `fold-operator`, `spectral-theory`, `modular-tower-inverse-limit`

{{< include articles/category_02_equalizing_things_folding_distinctions.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_02_equalizing_things_folding_distinctions Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_equalizing_things_folding_distinctions_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_equalizing_things_folding_distinctions_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_02_equalizing_things_folding_distinctions_infographic.png)

---

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
